title: Internal fault on macOS
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  

[process_pool_test.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/19270956/process_pool_test.zip)

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```bash
verilator --binary --top top process_pool.sv test_process_pool.sv -Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-SYMRSVDWORD                                
%Error: Verilator internal fault, sorry. Suggest trying --debug --gdbbt
%Error: Command Failed /opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.034/bin/verilator_bin --binary --top top process_pool.sv test_process_pool.sv -Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-SYMRSVDWORD
```
After add `--debug` option, the compile is success.

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

`Verilator 5.034 2025-02-24 rev UNKNOWN.REV`

What OS and distribution are you using?

macOS sequoia 15.3.2

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

lldb trace message is
```
lldb -- /opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.034/bin/verilator_bin --binary --top top process_pool.sv test_process_pool.sv -Wno-lint -Wno-style -Wno-SYMRSVDWORD
(lldb) target create "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.034/bin/verilator_bin"
Current executable set to '/opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.034/bin/verilator_bin' (arm64).
(lldb) settings set -- target.run-args  "--binary" "--top" "top" "process_pool.sv" "test_process_pool.sv" "-Wno-lint" "-Wno-style" "-Wno-SYMRSVDWORD"
(lldb) run
Process 43761 launched: '/opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.034/bin/verilator_bin' (arm64)
Process 43761 stopped
* thread #1, queue = 'com.apple.main-thread', stop reason = EXC_BAD_ACCESS (code=1, address=0x2)
    frame #0: 0x0000000100049fcc verilator_bin`FileLine::ascii() const + 32
verilator_bin`FileLine::ascii:
->  0x100049fcc <+32>: ldrh   w1, [x20, #0x2]
    0x100049fd0 <+36>: add    x8, sp, #0x48
    0x100049fd4 <+40>: bl     0x1003b3a40    ; symbol stub for: FileLineSingleton::numberToName(unsigned short) const
    0x100049fd8 <+44>: adrp   x1, 1162
Target 0: (verilator_bin) stopped.
(lldb) bt
* thread #1, queue = 'com.apple.main-thread', stop reason = EXC_BAD_ACCESS (code=1, address=0x2)
  * frame #0: 0x0000000100049fcc verilator_bin`FileLine::ascii() const + 32
    frame #1: 0x00000001001507e8 verilator_bin`EmitCFunc::visit(AstComment*) + 84
    frame #2: 0x00000001000ce608 verilator_bin`AstNode::iterateAndNextConst(VNVisitorConst&) + 52
    frame #3: 0x000000010014fab4 verilator_bin`EmitCFunc::visit(AstCFunc*) + 2048
    frame #4: 0x000000010015c1b8 verilator_bin`EmitCImp::emitCFuncImp(AstNodeModule const*) + 504
    frame #5: 0x000000010015bca4 verilator_bin`EmitCImp::EmitCImp(AstNodeModule const*, bool, std::__1::deque<AstCFile*, std::__1::allocator<AstCFile*>>&) + 140
    frame #6: 0x00000001001616c4 verilator_bin`std::__1::__function::__func<V3EmitC::emitcImp()::$_1, std::__1::allocator<V3EmitC::emitcImp()::$_1>, void ()>::operator()() + 32
    frame #7: 0x000000010014dd34 verilator_bin`V3EmitC::emitcImp() + 344
    frame #8: 0x00000001000c93a4 verilator_bin`verilate(std::__1::basic_string<char, std::__1::char_traits<char>, std::__1::allocator<char>> const&) + 3876
    frame #9: 0x00000001000c7d38 verilator_bin`main + 348
    frame #10: 0x0000000190630274 dyld`start + 2840
```
